conditions: intro week lasts 1 week at each block start; avoid reading early underperformance as a stall

rationale_templates.increase_load: Performance exceeded target range. Increase load next exposure.
rationale_templates.hold_load: Performance stayed in range. Hold load and chase the rep ceiling.
rationale_templates.reduce_load: Performance repeatedly fell below target. Reduce load to restore quality.
rationale_templates.deload: Program intent calls for an intro/deload reset at block boundaries or when fatigue pressure is high.

source_sections.heading: Important Program Notes
source_sections.excerpt: For the first week of all programs, most sets are taken to an RPE of ~7-9 ... This only lasts for the first week (to serve as a deload/intro week).

source_sections.heading: Block Notes
source_sections.excerpt: Block 1 starts with an intro/deload week ... Block 2 starts with an intro/deload week at week 6.
